The illusory Apple global supply chain OEM template in the original data has been completely written off. This enterprise, named 'Xinai Electric,' stands firmly on the new energy vehicle trend. The probe mercilessly deleted all 'manufacturing, R&D' delusions in the license used to freeload subsidies or put up a front, extracting what it can actually do in the real world: 'charging pile sales; electric vehicle charging infrastructure operations; motor vehicle charging sales; parking lot services.' The boss highly likely leased a site (parking lot) in Tangshan Sub-district, bought and installed a few charging piles, and usually watches over the place alone collecting charging fees (motor vehicle charging sales), while concurrently acting as a regional sales agent for charging equipment. The official 'Electrical Machinery Manufacturing Entity' tag is the most absurd misinterpretation of this lowest-level new energy service terminal.
